caribbean.headline: Caribbean Winds Rise
caribbean.paragraph: St. Maarten is experiencing 22 kt winds with 5.3 ft wave heights and a 76% rain probability, while Martinique has 12 kt winds. I expect the strong easterly winds and high rain probability to impact cruise ship operations in St. Maarten today.

mediterranean.headline: Mediterranean Storms Bring Heavy Rain
mediterranean.paragraph: Haifa is experiencing 88% rain probability with winds reaching 14 kt and wave heights of 5.7 ft, while Barcelona has a much calmer condition with max wind of 8 kt, making Haifa the top impact port in the Mediterranean today. The dominant swell direction of WNW and short swell period of 6 s will contribute to the rough sea conditions in Haifa, requiring extra caution for ships navigating the area.
